mapper.select: SELECT CD_GROUP_ID , CD_GROUP_NM , CD_GROUP_DESC , USE_YN , CRET_DT FROM NMCP_CD_GROUP_BAS WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = #{idx}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS DUPID FROM NMCP_CD_GROUP_BAS WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = UPPER(#{cdGroupId})

SELECT CD_GROUP_ID ,DTL_CD ,DTL_CD_NM ,DTL_CD_DESC ,INDC_ODRG ,USE_YN ,EXPNSN_STR_VAL1 ,EXPNSN_STR_VAL2 ,EXPNSN_STR_VAL3 ,CRET_ID ,AMD_ID ,CRET_DT ,AMD_DT ,UP_GRP_CD FROM NMCP_CD_DTL WHERE 1=1
AND CRET_DT = ( SELECT MAX(CRET_DT) FROM NMCP_CD_DTL WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = #{cdGroupId} AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND TO_DATE(PSTNG_END_DATE, 'yyyymmddhh24miss') > SYSDATE AND TO_DATE(PSTNG_START_DATE, 'yyyymmddhh24miss') <= SYSDATE )
AND CD_GROUP_ID = #{cdGroupId} AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND TO_DATE(PSTNG_END_DATE, 'yyyymmddhh24miss') > SYSDATE
AND EXPNSN_STR_VAL1 = #{expnsnStrVal1}
ORDER BY INDC_ODRG

SELECT /*CommCodeMapper.getCodeAllList*/ T1.CD_GROUP_ID ,T1.CD_GROUP_NM ,T1.CD_GROUP_DESC ,T1.EXPNSN_STR_VAL1 AS GRP_EXPNSN_STR_VAL1 ,T1.EXPNSN_STR_VAL2 AS GRP_EXPNSN_STR_VAL2 ,T1.EXPNSN_STR_VAL3 AS GRP_EXPNSN_STR_VAL3 ,T2.DTL_CD ,T2.DTL_CD_NM ,T2.DTL_CD_DESC ,T2.INDC_ODRG ,T2.EXPNSN_STR_VAL1 ,T2.EXPNSN_STR_VAL2 ,T2.EXPNSN_STR_VAL3 ,T1.CD_GROUP_CD ,T2.PSTNG_START_DATE ,T2.PSTNG_END_DATE ,T2.IMG_NM FROM NMCP_CD_GROUP_BAS T1, NMCP_CD_DTL T2 WHERE T1.CD_GROUP_ID = T2.CD_GROUP_ID AND T1.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T2.USE_YN = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN T1.PSTNG_START_DATE AND T1.PSTNG_END_DATE ORDER BY T1.CD_GROUP_ID, T2.INDC_ODRG
mapper.update: UPDATE /*CommCodeMapper.upMnpCmpnListInit 번호이동 사업자 조회 후 공통코드 초기화 처리 */ NMCP_CD_DTL SET PSTNG_END_DATE = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') WHERE 1=1 AND CD_GROUP_ID = 'NSC'

MERGE INTO NMCP_CD_DTL USING DUAL ON (DTL_CD = #{dtlCd} AND CD_GROUP_ID ='NSC' ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET AMD_ID = 'SYSTEM' , AMD_DT = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( CD_GROUP_ID , DTL_CD , DTL_CD_NM , INDC_ODRG , USE_YN , EXPNSN_STR_VAL1 , EXPNSN_STR_VAL2 , EXPNSN_STR_VAL3 , DTL_CD_DESC , CRET_ID , CRET_DT , AMD_ID , AMD_DT , PSTNG_START_DATE , PSTNG_END_DATE ) VALUES ( 'NSC' , #{dtlCd} , #{dtlCdNm} , #{indcOdrg} , 'N' , #{expnsnStrVal1} , '' , '' , '' , 'SYSTEM' , SYSDATE , 'SYSTEM' , SYSDATE , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') , '99991231235959' )
mapper.select: /*CommCodeMapper.getDtlCodeWithNm*/ SELECT A.CD_GROUP_ID ,B.DTL_CD ,B.DTL_CD_NM ,B.PSTNG_START_DATE ,B.PSTNG_END_DATE FROM NMCP_CD_GROUP_BAS A, NMCP_CD_DTL B WHERE A.CD_GROUP_ID = B.CD_GROUP_ID AND A.CD_GROUP_ID = #{cdGroupId} AND B.DTL_CD_NM = #{dtlCdNm} AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND B.USE_YN = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN A.PSTNG_START_DATE AND A.PSTNG_END_DATE AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN B.PSTNG_START_DATE AND B.PSTNG_END_DATE AND ROWNUM= 1

/*CommCodeMapper.getAllDtlCdList*/ SELECT A.CD_GROUP_ID ,B.DTL_CD ,B.DTL_CD_NM ,B.USE_YN ,B.EXPNSN_STR_VAL1 ,B.PSTNG_START_DATE ,B.PSTNG_END_DATE FROM NMCP_CD_GROUP_BAS A, NMCP_CD_DTL B WHERE A.CD_GROUP_ID = B.CD_GROUP_ID AND A.CD_GROUP_ID = #{cdGroupId} AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN A.PSTNG_START_DATE AND A.PSTNG_END_DATE ORDER BY B.INDC_ODRG
